#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>

long long solve(std::vector<long long> landStartTime, std::vector<long long> landDuration, std::vector<long long> waterStartTime, std::vector<long long> waterDuration) {
    // Calculate all possible end times for land and water attractions
    std::vector<long long> landEndTimes;
    std::vector<long long> waterEndTimes;

    for (int i = 0; i < landStartTime.size(); ++i) {
        landEndTimes.push_back(landStartTime[i] + landDuration[i]);
    }

    for (int j = 0; j < waterStartTime.size(); ++j) {
        waterEndTimes.push_back(waterStartTime[j] + waterDuration[j]);
    }

    // Find the earliest possible end time for each combination of land and water attractions
    long long minTime = LONG_LONG_MAX;

    for (long long landEnd : landEndTimes) {
        for (long long waterEnd : waterEndTimes) {
            // If the water attraction starts after the land attraction ends, we can take the max of the two
            long long totalTime = std::max(landEnd, waterEnd);
            minTime = std::min(minTime, totalTime);
        }
    }

    return minTime;
}

def solve(landStartTime : Array(Int64), landDuration : Array(Int64), waterStartTime : Array(Int64), waterDuration : Array(Int64)) : Int64
  land_end_times = landStartTime.map { |s| s + duration }
  water_end_times = waterStartTime.map { |s| s + duration }

  min_time = Int64::MAX

  land_end_times.each do |land_end|
    water_end_times.each do |water_end|
      total_time = [land_end, water_end].max
      min_time = [min_time, total_time].min
    end
  end

  min_time
end
```

long long solve(std::vector<long long> landStartTime, std::vector<long long> landDuration, std::vector<long long> waterStartTime, std::vector<long long> waterDuration) {
    // Calculate all possible end times for land and water attractions
    std::vector<long long> landEndTimes;
    std::vector<long long> waterEndTimes;

    for (int i = 0; i < landStartTime.size(); ++i) {
        landEndTimes.push_back(landStartTime[i] + landDuration[i]);
    }

    for (int j = 0; j < waterStartTime.size(); ++j) {
        waterEndTimes.push_back(waterStartTime[j] + waterDuration[j]);
    }

    // Find the earliest possible end time for each combination of land and water attractions
    long long minTime = LONG_LONG_MAX;

    for (long long landEnd : landEndTimes) {
        for (long long waterEnd : waterEndTimes) {
            // If the water attraction starts after the land attraction ends, we can take the max of the two
            long long totalTime = std::max(landEnd, waterEnd);
            minTime = std::min(minTime, totalTime);
        }
    }

    return minTime;
}

long long solve(std::vector<long long> landStartTime, std::vector<long long> landDuration, std::vector<long long> waterStartTime, std::vector<long long> waterDuration) {
    // Calculate all possible end times for land and water attractions
    std::vector<long long> landEndTimes;
    std::vector<long long> waterEndTimes;

    for (int i = 0; i < landStartTime.size(); ++i) {
        landEndTimes.push_back(landStartTime[i] + landDuration[i]);
    }

    for (int j = 0; j < waterStartTime.size(); ++j) {
        waterEndTimes.push_back(waterStartTime[j] + waterDuration[j]);
    }

    // Find the earliest possible end time for each combination of land and water attractions
    long long minTime = LONG_LONG_MAX;

    for (long long landEnd : landEndTimes) {
        for (long long waterEnd : waterEndTimes) {
            // If the water attraction starts after the land attraction ends, we can take the max of the two
            long long totalTime = std::max(landEnd, waterEnd);
            minTime = std::min(minTime, totalTime);
        }
    }

    return minTime;
}
